---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want to do?

Describe the use case — what you are trying to build or analyze, not just the feature.

## Scale

Roughly how many tracks / how large a library is this for? (e.g. a few files, ~1k tracks, 100k+ collection)

## Notes

Anything else — related tools, references, or a sketch of the API you'd like.
